text:
Owner-curated The Duchy resource
The supplied directory recommends The Duchy for intermediate floor-based rope-bondage lessons: https://www.theduchy.com/.
The inspected home page describes an education-focused tutorial library for all experience levels, with explicit pages marked. Its free material includes scene context, consent, risk management, negotiation and planning, foundations, rope choice, basic knots, cuffs, and harnesses. Membership adds the full main library and sections about combining ties into scenes, reverse-engineering other rope work, and creating rope floggers or whips.
title: Owner-curated The Duchy resource
